_doc.purpose: Source-of-truth invariants exercised by tests/test_skill_invariants.py. Each check guards a portability rule migrated from the maintainer's personal layer into the repo CLAUDE.md (see kaizen#53). Checks are keyword/anchor-based on purpose: literal-sentence assertions would break on benign editorial polish and erode trust in the test, defeating the point. Tier rationale follows Phase 3 consensus (RFC-2119 voice × evidence tiers).

check_types.regex_present: regex pattern matched anywhere in file
check_types.regex_in_section: regex pattern matched within the named markdown section (heading line through next heading at same-or-shallower depth)
check_types.all_keywords: every keyword string present (case-sensitive substring) anywhere in file
check_types.any_of_keywords: at least one of the keyword strings present anywhere in file
check_types.all_keywords_in_section: every keyword present within the named section; if `any_of_keywords` is also set, at least one of those must also appear in the section
check_types.absent: literal pattern string MUST NOT appear in file
check_types.exists: file exists at the given path (relative to repo root)

tbd_files: PERSONAL_CLEANUP_AFTER_MERGE.md is created by Wave 1 A6; the `personal-cleanup-artifact-exists` check will fail until that file lands. CI gates on the full Wave 1 + Wave 2 sequence, not on this fixture in isolation.

checks.rationale: The dedicated section anchor is the contract surface for everything that follows. Loss of the heading would silently disable all section-scoped checks.
Bright-line between rules that apply when working ON kaizen vs rules that apply when kaizen runs against a target repo. ai-ethicist Phase 2.
Repo CLAUDE.md supersedes personal layer. Without this, a personal-rule survivor after merge could compete with the migrated rule and reintroduce four-way drift.
Kaizen MUST NOT modify the user's personal `~/.claude` files. Carve-out keeps the migration a one-way contract; ai-safety Phase 2.
Worker subagents must run ruff (check + format) AND pytest before reporting green. High-evidence (multi-incident); MUST-tier.
Phase 4 implementers must mirror the TARGET repo's CI. Avoid 'kaizen has 5 checks therefore everyone has 5 checks' over-generalization (backend-engineer's JS-repo footgun).

The kaizen-on-kaizen and atelier-on-atelier case is 5 checks (ruff check, ruff format --check, bandit, pip-audit, pytest) — explicitly correcting the prior 3-check belief. Enumeration is illustrative for the kaizen self-CI case.
`record_cycle_success` MUST fire before `push_branch` or the PR title renders 0 succeeded (run 19/PR#30). Ordering language must be present.
Branch name passed downstream MUST be the canonical/verbatim string returned by `create_branch` — never a retyped slug (run 17).
Team-mode teammates communicate via SendMessage; spawn-prompt output is not auto-relayed; teammates MUST NOT just go idle (run 20 smoke / PR#31).
Independent reviewer subagent + review→fix→review loop must not be collapsed (kaizen#22 cycle 2 caught 3 silent-data-loss blockers).
The personal-rule string 'User-initiated only' was removed in PR#52 (kaizen-first-for-app-work supersedes it). Lock the absence in so a future copy-paste regression is caught at CI.
test_skill_invariants.py must consume this fixture as its source of truth; ensures A5's loader wiring stays connected.
Wave 1 A6 produces PERSONAL_CLEANUP_AFTER_MERGE.md at repo root. Its existence is the deliverable for the 'Personal cleanup to apply after merge' acceptance criterion in kaizen#53.
kaizen#54 — repo CLAUDE.md must carry the model + effort recommendation so installers inherit the maintainer's posture.
kaizen#54 — default model + effort must be named explicitly (Opus 4.7 + high effortLevel).
kaizen#54 acceptance criterion: the recommendation is ADVISORY, not enforced. Lock the word 'advisory' into the section so a future contributor doesn't accidentally upgrade it to a hard requirement.
kaizen#51 — the ### Process-artifact storage subsection must have a real body naming Memex as canonical store (no longer the cycle-1 TBD placeholder).
kaizen#51 — process-artifact directories must be in .gitignore so future commits don't accidentally re-track them.

kaizen#51 explicitly reverses the prior 'git is canonical store for cycle minutes' stance in internal/cycle/SKILL.md. The reversed phrasing must be present so a future contributor doesn't restore the legacy text.
